name: Chicken Pot Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the chicken with cold water in a pot. Bring to a boil and drain.
2. Recover the chicken with cold water and bring to a boil again. Skim any foam from the surface.
3. Add onions and celery, then simmer until the chicken is tender.
4. Remove the chicken from the pot and strain the broth through a fine-mesh sieve.
5. Return the broth to the pot and add potatoes, shredded chicken, salt, pepper, and parsley.
6. Simmer over medium heat for 10 minutes.
7. Bring to a boil, then stir in the noodles. Cook until the noodles are tender, about 10-20 minutes.
Diced hard-cooked eggs can be added prior to serving.
